description_long: This is a residential property featuring multiple houses arranged along a landscaped lot, with a mix of architectural styles and roof shapes. The main section includes three prominent houses with pitched roofs, surrounded by manicured lawns, flowering trees, and hedges. A secondary building with a flat roof and arched windows sits apart, adjacent to a rectangular swimming pool and bordered by a dense hedge. The property is enclosed by greenery, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. Driveways and paved walkways connect the buildings, and the overall layout suggests a suburban or upscale neighborhood setting. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of painted wood, brick, and concrete, with large windows and decorative elements.
description: A landscaped residential property with multiple houses, pitched and flat roofs, surrounded by trees, hedges, and a pool. The layout features driveways, walkways, and a mix of architectural styles.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main houses with pitched roofs, the landscaped front yard, and the secondary building with a flat roof and pool to the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the flat-roofed secondary building and pool are prominent, with the main houses and their gardens visible in the background.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the main houses, the dense hedges, and the separation between the main and secondary buildings.
description_view_3: The view emphasizes the driveway, the side of the main houses, and the connection to the secondary building and pool area.
attribute_architectural_style: Eclectic (mix of Colonial Revival and Modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature steps, covered porches, and decorative columns, with prominent front doors and landscaped approaches.
